claims: First anticipatory constitutional primitive: governed early-warning emission before Hard-class invariant breach, enabling pre-violation governance intervention
Warning corridor detection: SentinelAdvisory emitted when metric >= warning_threshold with margin_remaining = violation_threshold - metric_value
Multi-channel tick architecture: ConstitutionalEpochSentinel evaluates all registered SentinelChannels in a single atomic tick call (CES-WATCH-0)
Chain-linked advisory ledger with hmac.compare_digest tamper detection enabling deterministic replay of all proximity-warning events
